texto: If I measure each day by my list, the days are not always very good, but when I look at each day like it is their day too, because it is their day, well, then most days are better. A lot better.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Ashlee Gadd: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a familia. O trecho “If I measure each day by my list, the days are not always very good, but when I look at each day …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, motherhood, parenting pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de parenting.
